sentences.arabic: تَشْهَدُ الدُّوَلُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ نَهْضَةً تِقْنِيَّةً كَبِيرَةً فِي السَّنَوَاتِ الْأَخِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapske zemlje svjedoče velikom tehničkom usponu posljednjih godina.
sentences.translationEn: Arab countries are witnessing a major technical renaissance in recent years.

sentences.arabic: تَدْعَمُ الْحُكُومَاتُ الِابْتِكَارَ الرَّقْمِيَّ وَتَطْوِيرَ الْمُدُنِ الذَّكِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Vlade podržavaju digitalne inovacije i razvoj pametnih gradova.
sentences.translationEn: Governments support digital innovation and the development of smart cities.

sentences.arabic: يَبْتَكِرُ الشَّبَابُ الْعَرَبُ مَشَارِيعَ جَدِيدَةً فِي مَجَالِ التِّكْنُولُوجْيَا.
sentences.translation: Arapska omladina kreira nove projekte u oblasti tehnologije.
sentences.translationEn: Arab youth are innovating new projects in the field of technology.
